achievements.requirement: Release the most popular Graphics, Animations, or Audio Mod

achievements.requirement: Release the most popular Player Home Mod

achievements.name: Champion of Clutter
achievements.requirement: Release the most popular Items Mod

achievements.requirement: Release the most popular Character Customization Mod

achievements.requirement: Release the most popular Towns and Cities Mod

achievements.name: The People's Choice
achievements.requirement: Most Endorsed Mod

achievements.name: Ad Populum
achievements.requirement: Most Downloaded Mod

achievements.name: Master Of Madness
achievements.requirement: Earn the highest number of unique achievements

achievements.name: Emperor, King, and Justice
achievements.requirement: Highest cumulative number of endorsements for all mods

achievements.name: Challenge Accepted
achievements.requirement: Release a Mod for Each Weekly Themed Challenge

achievements.name: A Warrior's Legacy
achievements.requirement: Unlock all Silver and Bronze Achievements

achievements.name: A Show Of Power
achievements.requirement: Achieve at least 25 endorsements and 250 downloads with a Modathon Mod.

achievements.name: You Are A Credit To Your House
achievements.requirement: Achieve at least 25 endorsements on a Modathon Mod

achievements.name: Cliff Racer Fly So High
achievements.requirement: Release at least 5 mods for Modathon

achievements.name: Cult of Personality
achievements.requirement: Achieve 50 combined endorsements for all mods released for the Modathon

achievements.name: Destined For Great Things
achievements.requirement: Achieve 500 combined downloads for all mods released for the Modathon

achievements.name: Lesh Make A Deal
achievements.requirement: Achieve over 250 Downloads on a Modathon Mod

achievements.name: Available for Hire
achievements.requirement: Cooperate with at least two different modders on two different mods

achievements.name: Let Me Tell You A Story
achievements.requirement: Achieve at least 10 endorsements on a Modathon Mod

achievements.name: Triple Threat
achievements.requirement: Release at least 3 mods for Modathon.

achievements.name: I'm Creeping!
achievements.requirement: Achieve Over 100 Downloads on a Modathon Mod

achievements.name: Improve My Effectiveness
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which qualifies for at least 5 achievements upon initial release

achievements.name: Jack-Of-All-Trades
achievements.requirement: Release a separate mod in at least 4 different categories

achievements.name: You and I Are About to Become Very Close
achievements.requirement: Cooperate with at least one other modder to release a Modathon mod.

achievements.name: Adventures Await
achievements.requirement: Release a Quest or Guilds & Factions Mod

achievements.name: New Horizons
achievements.requirement: Release a Landscape or Landmass Mod

achievements.name: Im-Leet and Rolf the Uber
achievements.requirement: Release a Companion, Creature, or NPC Mod

achievements.name: I Like the Way You Look
achievements.requirement: Release a Character Customization Mod

achievements.name: Stimulate the Senses
achievements.requirement: Release a Graphics, Animations, or Audio Mod

achievements.name: Morrowind is Home
achievements.requirement: Release a Player Home Mod

achievements.name: Cluttermonkey
achievements.requirement: Release an Items Mod

achievements.name: Let Me Tweak That
achievements.requirement: Release a Gameplay, Bug Fix, Patch, or UI Mod

achievements.name: The Only Game In Town
achievements.requirement: Release a Towns and Cities Mod

achievements.name: Better Bring A Torch
achievements.requirement: Release a Dungeon Mod

achievements.name: Let Me Immerse You
achievements.requirement: Release an Immersion Mod

achievements.name: The Lusty Argonian Maid
achievements.requirement: Release a Modder's Resource or Utility

achievements.name: Medalist
achievements.requirement: Release a themed challenge mod which earns a bronze, silver, and gold achievement by the end of Modathon

achievements.name: Breaking Barriers
achievements.requirement: Release themed challenge mods in two different weeks which cover at least four different categories between them

achievements.name: Lighting the Way
achievements.requirement: Release a themed challenge mod that also unlocks a hidden achievement.

achievements.name: Punctually Perfect
achievements.requirement: Release three themed challenge mods that also unlock a date achievement

achievements.name: Twisting Paths
achievements.requirement: Release a themed challenge mod two weeks in a row

achievements.name: Mastermind
achievements.requirement: Release a themed challenge mod which simultaneously unlocks three metric achievements

achievements.name: Tag Teaming
achievements.requirement: Release two themed challenge mods in cooperation with other modders

achievements.name: Mysticism & Prophecy
achievements.requirement: Release a mod featuring both themes in the first week

achievements.name: Fortune & Woe
achievements.requirement: Release a mod featuring both themes in the second week

achievements.name: Illusion & Infection
achievements.requirement: Release a mod featuring both themes in the third week

achievements.name: Ruins & Relics
achievements.requirement: Release a mod featuring both themes in the fourth week

achievements.name: Tamriel Imports
achievements.requirement: Release a mod requiring AATL Data, OAAB_Data or Tamriel_Data

achievements.name: Double Trouble
achievements.requirement: Release at least 2 mods for Modathon

achievements.name: Novice of Madness
achievements.requirement: Release your first mod for a Modathon

achievements.name: Veteran of Madness
achievements.requirement: Release a mod in exactly two Modathons

achievements.name: CHIMming It
achievements.requirement: Release a mod in three or more Modathons

achievements.name: Ahh yes, we've been expecting you
achievements.requirement: Release a mod on May 1st.

achievements.name: May the Fourth Be With You
achievements.requirement: Release a mod on May 4th

achievements.name: May The Ides Be Ever In Your Favor
achievements.requirement: Release a mod on May 15th

achievements.name: Cutting It Close
achievements.requirement: Release a mod on June 1st or 2nd

achievements.name: Backup Plan
achievements.requirement: Release two or more mods within 48 hours of each other

achievements.name: Back For Another Round
achievements.requirement: Release two mods in the same category

achievements.name: A Puzzler's Paradise
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that uses or adds puzzle-based mechanics.

achievements.name: A Sonorous Knell
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that adds new sound effects to the game.

achievements.name: Chronomancer
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that allows the player to manipulate time in some way

achievements.name: Dreams And Visions
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which includes an in-game dream or vision sequence

achievements.name: Eclipsing Mundus
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that takes the player to a realm of Oblivion

achievements.name: Finders Keepers
achievements.requirement: Be the first to unlock three separate hidden achievements

achievements.name: Historian
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which involves a historical figure

achievements.name: I Swear He Was Here Yesterday
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that adds or uses an NPC scheduling mechanic

achievements.name: Master of Disguise
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that allows the player to disguise themselves as an NPC or creature

achievements.name: Melting Pot
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which includes an interior with NPCs from 3 different factions in it

achievements.name: Nothing Left
achievements.requirement: Release mods which collectively cover all 11 Modathon categories

achievements.name: Pathfinder
achievements.requirement: Release a mod with an area that is difficult to navigate and provides a map or compass

achievements.name: Piercing the Veil
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that changes how death is handled in Morrowind

achievements.name: Putting the Mer in Merchant
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that adds an elvish merchant with custom dialogue

achievements.name: Reaching for Aetherius
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which involves the constellations

achievements.name: Read All About It!
achievements.requirement: Release a mod with an actual Read Me file

achievements.name: The Blue Ones Are Nice
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that adds new dinnerware to the game

achievements.name: The Clan Ascendant
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that expands upon one of the game's vampire factions

achievements.name: The Hunter's Moon
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that adds a new type of were-creature.

achievements.name: The Naturalist
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which adds at least 3 new plant and/or animal ingredients which originate from Nirn

achievements.name: The Outsider
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which adds a new playable race

achievements.name: The Pacifist
achievements.requirement: Release a mod with at least 3 quests which can be completed without the player hurting a sentient being

achievements.name: The Riddler
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that tests the player with riddles.

achievements.name: Think it'll Rain?
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that adds new types of weather phenomena

achievements.name: Trailblazer
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that adds new travel connections.

achievements.name: Tribes and Tribulations
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that expands upon the culture, customs, or quests of the Ashlanders.

achievements.name: Twin Moons
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which involves Masser and Secunda

achievements.name: Vvardenfell Vigilante
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which lets the player solve a crime

achievements.name: You Wouldn't Download A Guar
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that allows the player to buy or steal a guar.
